---
title: High-resolution spatial allocation of soybean genotypes based on enviromics
lang: en
date-format: long
link-citations: true
author:
  - name: Mauricio S. Araújo
    email: mauricioaraujj@usp.br
    affiliations:
      - name: Departamento de Genética, Escola Superior de Agricultura Luiz de Queiroz (ESALQ-USP)
        city: Piracicaba
        region: São Paulo
        country: Brazil
  - name: Gabriel M. Blasques
    email: gabriel.blasques@ufv.br
    affiliations:
      - name: Departamento de Agronomia, Universidade Federal de Viçosa (UFV)
        city: Viçosa
        region: Minas Gerais
        country: Brazil
  - name: José B. Pinheiro
    email: jbadin@usp.br
    affiliations:
      - name: Departamento de Genética, Escola Superior de Agricultura Luiz de Queiroz (ESALQ-USP)
        city: Piracicaba
        region: São Paulo
        country: Brazil
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: Sections
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 4
    toc_float: true
    theme: [zephyr, theme.scss]
    embed-resources: true
    anchor-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-newwindow: false
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-block-border-left: "#781c1e"
    code-copy: hover
    code-summary: "Show/Hide Code"
    lang: en
    fig-format: png
    fig-responsive: true
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
    page-layout: article
    csl: apa.csl
    css: styles.css
    title-block-banner: true
    title-block-banner-color: 'white'
    highlight-style: github
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

::: logo
<img src="logo1.png" alt="Logo do laboratório" width="250"/>
:::

::: env-box
# Pipeline
:::

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(gghighlight)
library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggdendro)
library(ggrepel)
library(viridis)
library(cowplot)
library(forcats)
library(asreml)
library(purrr)
library(pls)
library(sf)
library(ggspatial)
library(ggnewscale)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(viridisLite)
library(grid)
library(colorspace)
source("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saulo-chaves/May_b_useful/refs/heads/main/fa_outs.R")

```

## Data reading and likelihood ratio test (LRT)

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
data <- read.csv("data.csv", sep=";")


data = transform(data,
                 gen = factor(gen),
                 rep = factor(rep),
                 env = factor(env),
                 yield = as.numeric(yield))


num.env = nlevels(data$env)
num.gen = nlevels(data$gen)
name.env = levels(data$env)
name.gen = levels(data$gen)


significancia <- c()
for (i in levels(data$env)) {
  mod0 <- asreml(yield ~ rep,
                 random = ~ gen,
                 data = data, maxit = 100,
                 na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include"),
                 subset = env == i)
  
  mod1 <- asreml(yield ~ rep,
                 data = data, maxit = 100,
                 na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include"),
                 subset = env == i)
  
  significancia[i] <- lrt(mod0, mod1)[3]
}

sign_df <- data.frame(env = names(significancia),
                      pvalor = as.numeric(significancia))

ambientes_excluir <- sign_df$env[sign_df$pvalor > 0.05]
data <- droplevels(subset(data, !(env %in% ambientes_excluir)))


num.env = nlevels(data$env)
num.gen = nlevels(data$gen)
name.env = levels(data$env)
name.gen = levels(data$gen)

rm(mod0, mod1, sign_df, significancia)
```

## Evaluating the optimal number of factors for the FA model

```{r, eval=FALSE}
## FA1
mod1 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 1),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)
mod1 <- update(mod1)

fa.res1 <- fa.outs(mod1, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res1$diagnostics


## FA2
mod2 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 2),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)
mod2 <- update(mod2)

fa.res2 <- fa.outs(mod2, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res2$diagnostics


## FA3
mod3 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 3),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)
mod3 <- update(mod3)

fa.res3 <- fa.outs(mod3, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res3$diagnostics


## FA4
mod4 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 4),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)
mod4 <- update(mod4)

fa.res4 <- fa.outs(mod4, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res4$diagnostics


## FA5
mod5 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 5),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)
mod5 <- update(mod5)

fa.res5 <- fa.outs(mod5, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res5$diagnostics


## FA6
mod6 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 6),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)
mod6 <- update(mod6)

fa.res6 <- fa.outs(mod6, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res6$diagnostics


## FA7
mod7 <- asreml(
  fixed    = yield ~ rep:env + env,
  random   = ~ gen:fa(env, 7),
  residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
  data     = data,
  maxit    = 50,
  na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include")
)

fa.res7 <- fa.outs(mod7, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
fa.res7$diagnostics
```

## Fitting the selected model

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

mod = asreml(fixed = yield ~ rep:env + env,
              random = ~ gen:fa(env, 6),
              residual = ~ dsum(~ id(units) | env),
              data = data,
              maxit = 50,
              na.action = na.method(x = "include", y = "include"))
mod = update(mod)


asreml.options(maxit = 50, workspace = '1gb', pworkspace = '2gb')
fa.res <- fa.outs(mod, name.env = "env", name.gen = "gen")
all <- fa.res$blups


fa.models = list(mod)
fa.res = lapply(fa.models, function(x) fa.outs(x, name.env = "env",
                                               name.gen = "gen"))
diagnos = do.call(rbind,lapply(fa.res, function(x) x$diagnostics))
rownames(diagnos) = c("mod"); diagnos[,'ASVR']


fa = fa.res[[1]]
rm(fa.models, fa.res); gc()

```

## Calculating the reliability and Factor Analytic Selection Tools metrics

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rel = fa$blups |>
  dplyr::reframe(rel = 1-(mean(std.error^2)/mean(diag(fa$Gvcov))), .by = gen)
FAST = data.frame(
  env = fa$blups$env,
  gen = fa$blups$gen,
  RMSD = (fa$blups$marginal - (kronecker(fa$rot.loads[,1], diag(num.gen)) %*%
                                  fa$rot.scores[,1]))^2
) |> dplyr::reframe(RMSD = sqrt(mean(RMSD)), .by = gen) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    OP = mean(fa$rot.loads[,1]) * fa$rot.scores[,1],
    index= 2*((OP-mean(OP))/sqrt(var(OP))) - ((RMSD-mean(RMSD))/sqrt(var(RMSD))),
    rel = rel$rel)




FAST |> ggplot(aes(x = RMSD, y = OP)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = rel)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  gghighlight(gen %in% FAST[order(FAST$index, decreasing = T),'gen'][1:16]) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(label = gen), size = 4, box.padding = .5,
                   max.overlaps = 30) +
  labs(colour = "Reliability") +
  scale_colour_viridis_c() +
  labs(x = "Root mean square deviation", y = "Overall performance")

```

## Leave-one-environment-out Cross-validation

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

matcovamb <- read.xlsx("featuresexperiments1.xlsx", rowNames = TRUE)

Lambda  <- as.matrix(fa$rot.loads)
CovAmb0 <- as.matrix(matcovamb)

envs <- intersect(rownames(Lambda), rownames(CovAmb0))
Lambda  <- Lambda[envs, , drop = FALSE]
CovAmb0 <- CovAmb0[envs, , drop = FALSE]

ok <- apply(CovAmb0, 2, 
            function(x) is.finite(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) 
            && sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
CovAmb <- scale(CovAmb0[, ok, drop = FALSE])

df <- data.frame(lambda = I(Lambda), CovAmb = I(CovAmb))

nmax <- pls::plsr(lambda ~ CovAmb, validation = "CV", data = df)$ncomp

cv.results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:nmax, function(j){
  acc_l <- acc_e <- numeric(0)
  for (i in rownames(CovAmb)) {
    tr <- df[rownames(df) != i, , drop = FALSE]
    te <- df[rownames(df) == i, , drop = FALSE]
    m  <- pls::plsr(lambda ~ CovAmb, validation = "CV", data = tr, ncomp = j)
    B  <- coef(m, intercept = TRUE)[-1, , 1]
    b0 <- coef(m, intercept = TRUE)[1,  , 1]
    pred_l <- te$CovAmb %*% B + matrix(b0, nrow = 1)
    acc_l <- c(acc_l, suppressWarnings(cor(as.numeric(pred_l),
                                           as.numeric(te$lambda))))
    pred_e <- tcrossprod(as.numeric(pred_l), fa$rot.scores)
    obs_e  <- fa$blups[fa$blups$env == i, "marginal"]
    acc_e <- c(acc_e, suppressWarnings(cor(as.numeric(pred_e),
                                           obs_e, method = "spearman")))
  }
  data.frame(ncomp = j, lambda = mean(acc_l, na.rm = TRUE),
             eblup = mean(acc_e, na.rm = TRUE))
}))

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
cv.results
```

## Selection coincidence plot

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

data.pls.lamb = df

pred_blup = list()
for (i in name.env) {
  train = data.pls.lamb[rownames(data.pls.lamb) != i,]
  test = data.pls.lamb[rownames(data.pls.lamb) == i,]
  
  cvloo = plsr(lambda ~ CovAmb, validation = 'CV', data = train, 
               ncomp = 4)
  pred_blup[[i]] = data.frame(
    pred = t(tcrossprod(
      test$CovAmb %*% coef(cvloo, intercept = T)[-1,,1] + 
        coef(cvloo, intercept = T)[1,,1],
      fa$rot.scores
    )),
    blup = fa$blups[fa$blups$env == i,'marginal'],
    env = i,
    gen = fa$blups[fa$blups$env == i,'gen']
  )
  colnames(pred_blup[[i]]) = c('pred', 'blup', 'env', 'gen')
}


pred.plot = do.call(rbind, pred_blup)


coinc = pred.plot |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = pred, y = blup)) + 
  geom_rug() + 
  geom_hline(
    data = pred.plot |> 
      reframe(qq = quantile(blup, probs = c(.2, .5, .75 ,.90))),
    aes(yintercept = qq, color = c('20%', '50%', '75%', '90%')), 
    linetype = 'dashed',
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) + 
  geom_vline(
    data = pred.plot |> 
      reframe(qq = quantile(pred, probs = c(.2, .5, .75 ,.90))),
    aes(xintercept = qq, color = c('20%', '50%', '75%', '90%')),
    linetype = 'dashed', 
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) + 
  scale_colour_manual('Quantiles', values = c('#e41a1c', '#377eb8',
                                              '#984ea3', '#4daf4a')) + 
  new_scale_colour() +
  geom_point(aes(colour = gen), size = 1.7, show.legend = F) + 
  scale_colour_viridis_d('Coincident', option = 'inferno')  +
  gghighlight(blup >= quantile(pred.plot$blup, .9)
              & pred >= quantile(pred.plot$pred, .9),
              unhighlighted_params = list(colour = 'darkgrey', size = 1), 
              use_direct_label = F) + 
  labs(x = 'Predicted', y = 'Observed', 
       caption = paste0('Coincidence = ', 
                        round(sum(pred.plot$blup >=
                                    quantile(pred.plot$blup, .9) & 
                                    pred.plot$pred >= 
                                    quantile(pred.plot$pred, .9)) / 
                                sum(pred.plot$pred >= 
                                    quantile(pred.plot$pred, .9)) * 100, 2),'%'))

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot(coinc)
```

## Partial least squares predictions

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

Experi <- read.xlsx("featuresexperiments1.xlsx", rowNames = TRUE)
a <- unique(data$env)
Experi <- droplevels(subset(Experi, row.names(Experi) %in% a))

data.pls.lamb = data.frame(lambda = I(fa$rot.loads),
                           CovAmb = I(scale(as.matrix(Experi))))

pls2.lamb = pls::plsr(lambda ~ CovAmb, validation = 'CV', data = data.pls.lamb,
                      ncomp = 4)
explvar(pls2.lamb)


coef_pls = coef(pls2.lamb, intercept = T)[,,1]


matcovamb_pred<- read.xlsx("featuresTPE_c.xlsx", rowNames = F)
matcovamb_pred <- matcovamb_pred[complete.cases(matcovamb_pred), ]


matcovamb_pred1 <- matcovamb_pred[, colnames(Experi)]


pred_lambda = scale(matcovamb_pred1) %*% coef_pls[-1, ]
pred_lambda = cbind(
  fa1 = pred_lambda[,'fa1'] + coef_pls["(Intercept)", "fa1"],
  fa2 = pred_lambda[,'fa2'] + coef_pls["(Intercept)", "fa2"],
  fa3 = pred_lambda[,'fa3'] + coef_pls["(Intercept)", "fa3"],
  fa4 = pred_lambda[,'fa4'] + coef_pls["(Intercept)", "fa4"],
  fa5 = pred_lambda[,'fa5'] + coef_pls["(Intercept)", "fa5"],
  fa6 = pred_lambda[,'fa6'] + coef_pls["(Intercept)", "fa6"]
)

EBLUPs_pred = as.matrix(pred_lambda[,'fa1']) %*% fa$rot.scores[,'fa1'] +
  as.matrix(pred_lambda[,'fa2']) %*% fa$rot.scores[,'fa2'] +
  as.matrix(pred_lambda[,'fa3']) %*% fa$rot.scores[,'fa3'] +
  as.matrix(pred_lambda[,'fa4']) %*% fa$rot.scores[,'fa4'] +
  as.matrix(pred_lambda[,'fa5']) %*% fa$rot.scores[,'fa5'] +
  as.matrix(pred_lambda[,'fa6']) %*% fa$rot.scores[,'fa6'] +
  mean(data$yield, na.rm = T)
```

## Which-won-where thematic map

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)


colnames(EBLUPs_pred) <- name.gen
idx <- max.col(EBLUPs_pred, ties.method = "first")

map_winners_plot <- matcovamb_pred %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    LON = as.numeric(LON),
    LAT = as.numeric(LAT),
    winner_gen = factor(colnames(EBLUPs_pred)[idx]),
    winner_val = EBLUPs_pred[cbind(dplyr::row_number(), idx)]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(LON), is.finite(LAT)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(LON, LAT) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(winner_val, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


min_pts <- 5000

winner_counts <- map_winners_plot %>%
  dplyr::count(winner_gen, name = "n_pts", sort = TRUE)

keep_levels <- winner_counts %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_pts >= min_pts) %>%
  dplyr::pull(winner_gen) %>%
  as.character()

map_winners_plot <- map_winners_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(winner_gen %in% keep_levels) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(winner_gen = factor(winner_gen, levels = keep_levels))


pts_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(map_winners_plot,
                       coords = c("LON","LAT"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)

malawi <- rnaturalearth::ne_countries(country = "Malawi",
                                      scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
bb_mw  <- sf::st_bbox(malawi); buf <- 0.5

pal <- colorspace::qualitative_hcl(
  n = nlevels(map_winners_plot$winner_gen),
  palette = "Dark 3"
)
names(pal) <- levels(map_winners_plot$winner_gen)


ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = "lightblue", color = NA) +
  geom_sf(data = pts_sf, aes(color = winner_gen),
          shape = 16, size = 0.001, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = NA, color = "red", linewidth = 0.9) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(bb_mw["xmin"] - buf, bb_mw["xmax"] + buf),
    ylim = c(bb_mw["ymin"] - buf, bb_mw["ymax"] + buf),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(
    shape = 15,
    size = 5, alpha = 1), ncol = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude", color = "Winner") +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8))

```

## Broad-adaptation thematic maps

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

colnames(EBLUPs_pred) <- name.gen
genos <- c("SCSENTINEL","SC_EXPT1","TGx20029FM","TGx20145GM","TGx201424FM",
           "TGx203392GZ","TGx201421FM","TGx200124FM")

malawi <- ne_countries(country = "Malawi", scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
bb     <- st_bbox(malawi)
buf    <- 0.5

all_blups <- as.numeric(as.matrix(EBLUPs_pred[, genos, drop = FALSE]))
all_blups <- all_blups[is.finite(all_blups)]

breaks <- seq(min(all_blups), max(all_blups), length.out = 7)
labels <- sprintf("%s – %s",
                  format(round(breaks[-7], 0), big.mark=".", scientific=FALSE),
                  format(round(breaks[-1], 0), big.mark=".", scientific=FALSE))
cols   <- viridis(length(labels), option = "turbo")
pal    <- setNames(cols, labels)


make_map <- function(g) {
  df <- matcovamb_pred %>%
    transmute(LON = as.numeric(LON),
              LAT = as.numeric(LAT),
              class = cut(as.numeric(EBLUPs_pred[, g]),
                          breaks, include.lowest = TRUE,
                          right = FALSE, labels = labels)) %>%
    filter(is.finite(LON), is.finite(LAT), !is.na(class))

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = "lightblue", color = NA) +
    geom_point(data = df, aes(LON, LAT, color = class),
               size = 0.20, alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal) +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(bb["xmin"]-buf, bb["xmax"]+buf),
             ylim = c(bb["ymin"]-buf, bb["ymax"]+buf), expand = FALSE) +
    labs(title = g) +
    theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
          panel.border = element_rect(colour="black", fill=NA, linewidth=0.6),
          axis.title = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.margin = margin(1, 0, 1, 0))
}


panel <- plot_grid(plotlist = lapply(genos, make_map),
                   ncol = 4, align = "hv", greedy = TRUE)


legend <- get_legend(
  ggplot(data.frame(class = factor(labels, levels = labels)),
         aes(class, 1, fill = class)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal, name = "\u0177 (kg ha\u207B\u00B9)") +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(direction="horizontal", title.position="left",
                               keywidth=unit(1.25,"cm"),
                               keyheight=unit(0.65,"cm"),
                               nrow=1)) +
    theme_void(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(legend.position="bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size=11),
          legend.text  = element_text(size=10))
)


```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
plot_grid(panel, legend, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.11))
```

## Pairwise comparison thematic map

```{r, results="hide", warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

colnames(EBLUPs_pred) <- name.gen
malawi <- ne_countries(country = "Malawi", scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
bb  <- st_bbox(malawi); buf <- 0.5

top3 <- c("TGx201424FM","TGx203392GZ","TGx201421FM")
bot3 <- c("TGx20029FM","TGx20145GM","TGx200124FM")

pairs <- list(c(top3[1],top3[2]), c(top3[1],top3[3]), c(top3[2],top3[3]),
              c(bot3[1],bot3[2]), c(bot3[1],bot3[3]), c(bot3[2],bot3[3]))
titles <- vapply(pairs, \(p) paste(p[1], "vs", p[2]), character(1))

pal_winner <- c("TGx201424FM"="#00ac79","TGx203392GZ"="#0018b7",
                "TGx201421FM"="#009ade",
                "TGx20029FM" ="#9f9400","TGx20145GM" ="#50a315",
                "TGx200124FM"="#a87be4")

make_pair_map <- function(g1, g2, ttl) {
  df <- matcovamb_pred %>%
    transmute(LON = as.numeric(LON),
              LAT = as.numeric(LAT),
              winner = ifelse(as.numeric(EBLUPs_pred[, g1])
                              >= as.numeric(EBLUPs_pred[, g2]), g1, g2)) %>%
    filter(is.finite(LON), is.finite(LAT), !is.na(winner))

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = "lightblue", color = NA) +
    geom_point(data = df, aes(LON, LAT, color = winner), size = 0.20,
               alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_sf(data = malawi, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal_winner, drop = FALSE) +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(bb["xmin"]-buf, bb["xmax"]+buf),
             ylim = c(bb["ymin"]-buf, bb["ymax"]+buf), expand = FALSE) +
    labs(title = ttl) +
    theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          panel.border = element_rect(colour="black", fill=NA, linewidth=0.6),
          axis.title = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "none",
          plot.margin = margin(4, 0, 4, 0))
}


maps  <- Map(\(p, t) make_pair_map(p[1], p[2], t), pairs, titles)
panel <- plot_grid(plotlist = maps, ncol = 3, align = "hv", greedy = TRUE)


needed <- unique(unlist(pairs))
legend <- get_legend(
  ggplot(data.frame(geno = factor(needed, levels = needed)),
         aes(geno, 1, fill = geno)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal_winner, name = "Winner") +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(direction = "horizontal",
                               title.position = "left",
                               keywidth = unit(1.1,"cm"),
                               keyheight = unit(0.55,"cm"),
                               nrow = 1)) +
    theme_void(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
          legend.text  = element_text(size = 10))
)


```

![](pairwise.png)
